title: The Game of Darts Update
content: BarkinMad Studios is pleased to announce a major update for The Game Of Darts, bringing new features, improved player feedback, and a better overall experience for darts players of all skill levels.
This update focuses on improving match analysis, player engagement, and making the app more enjoyable whether you’re practising alone, playing with friends, or competing in league matches.
New Voice Callers
For the first time, The Game Of Darts now includes voice callers.
Players can choose between Daniel and Serena to announce scores during matches, adding a more immersive and professional feel to every game.
This is the foundation for future caller packs and additional customisation options planned for future releases.
Post-Match Analysis
A new post-match analysis system has been introduced to help players better understand their performance.
Review key statistics and performance insights after each match to identify strengths, weaknesses, and areas for improvement.
Whether you’re chasing higher averages or improving your finishing, post-match analysis provides valuable feedback on your game.
Improved First-Time Experience
New players can now get started more quickly thanks to improvements to the onboarding experience.
The updated tour and help system make it easier to learn the app, understand available features, and begin scoring matches with minimal setup.
Enhanced Rewards & Unlocks
Additional rewarded opportunities have been added throughout the app, giving players more flexibility when unlocking features and extending gameplay.
These changes help support ongoing development while keeping the core scoring experience accessible to everyone.
Continued Improvements
This release also includes a range of user interface refinements, performance improvements, bug fixes, and stability enhancements across the application.
Work has also continued behind the scenes on BarkinMad Studios branding, shared technology, and future cross-app features.
Looking Ahead
Development of The Game Of Darts continues, with future updates planned for:
* Expanded statistics and analysis
* Additional caller voice packs
* DartBot improvements
* New player customisation options
* Further gameplay enhancements
Thank you to everyone who continues to support The Game Of Darts and provide feedback. Every update helps us make the app better for darts players around the world.
The Game Of Darts is available now on the App Store.
